label: About
title: About Billiard Aircraft Impact
short_blurb: A daily generated front page where the image is the interface.
body: Daily Frontpage is a daily generated interactive front page. Each edition starts from recent saved signals and source research, becomes a new image-led scene, and stays explorable in the archive. The image is the interface: visible marks, objects, and surfaces in the scene open the real sources that shaped the day.

This iteration began with 85 recent saved-signal files and 79 captured links, then narrowed the page to 9 source windows around @archivepilled: Nicolò Pucci di Benisichi, 'Biliardo con aereo' (2026) and @MireloAI: Today, together with @kyutai_labs, we’re introducing our new Audio-to-MIDI model. It..., plus 7 more. A source image from pbs.twimg.com helped set the palette, contrast, edge behavior, and gesture. The scene became Billiard Aircraft Impact: Material-macro fashion plate: a wide shallow crop where a saturated grass-green aircraft slab slices across the upper middle, motion-blurred and cropped hard left, colliding with a lower turquoise billiard-felt trapezoid. Brown rails drive diagonals toward a right-edge cueing smear; pale ceiling seams cross above. After the image was made, a plate-reading pass mapped 9 visible regions and the mask audit tightened them against dominant green glossy slab, white impact glare band, and central panel seam with rivets.

typography.rationale: Bricolage Grotesque and Space Grotesk fit record, arcade, and listening-room editions while Fraunces keeps source captions tactile.
